name: signed-checkpoint emission records the checkpoint in the audit log itself for traceability
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"event":"e1"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints --record-in-log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"checkpoint"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
